title: Chosen Immortal Clan
content:
Wang Lin encounter the Chosen Immortal Clan after he was sent out of the Thunder Celestial Realm to the interior of the 
Nether Beast
.

The Clan was enslaved by the Celestial to guard the 
Mysterious Yin Furnace
 and serve as food to the Fog Beast produced by the Furnace Black Fog.

History
[
]

Book 7
[
]

Wang Lin
 found the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
 in the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
. When they first saw him, they believed him to be a Celestial Messenger. They had thought that they were the servants of the 
Celestial Clan
 and that a Celestial Messenger had come back for their salvation. Wang Lin helps them fight off Demonic Fog Beast. Ta Shan, a 13 leaf tattoo cultivator, then challenge Wang Lin because he didn't believe in the Celestial beliefs of the clan. After losing, he became more respectful toward Wang Lin. When they entered the cave where the Mysterious Yin Furnace was held, Ta Shen asked Wang Lin if he was actually a Celestial Messenger. Wang Lin told him the truth about himself as well as the Celestial Clan and realm: The Celestial Realm had long collapse and there were very few Celestials left. Wang Lin also told him about the history of the Celestial and Immortal Clan and how the Celestials won the battle and enslaved the Immortal Clan.

Wang Lin stays with the Forsaken Immortal Clan for a while and after he went out of closed door cultivation, he finds out that Ta Shen is severely injured and on the brink of death. Wang Lin choose to risk refining Ta Shen into a Celestial puppet in hope of one day recovering his consciousness. Wang Lin then leads the Forsaken Immortal Clan out of the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
 into the Western Domain of the 
Allheaven Star System
. 

Book 8
[
]

Ta Shan regains his consciousness thanks to the Tattoo clan’s Holy Ancestor.
